eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 3:59 PM on JUN 14, 2026 Effective until 7:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: JACKSON COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE HAS ISSUED A LEVEL 1 BE READY TO EVACUATE ALERT FOR JAC-428 FOR A WILDFIRE NEAR THE 500 BLOCK OF SPENCER GULCH ROAD
